html:
Exclusive to:

“Produced by WX-78 with the Redigestion Circuit.

Can be moistened to be edible, or used as fertilizer.”

-

Nutribrick is a Food item in Don't Starve Together. It is made from processing 5 Rot, Rotten Egg, Spoiled Fish or Spoiled Fish Morsel using WX-78's Redigestion Circuit.

Equipping additional Redigestion Circuits allows WX-78 to make Nutribricks using less Rot, down to a minimum of 3 Rot. Having the Gamma Circuits Tinkering I skill allows any Spoiled foods (red freshness) that WX-78 eats to also contribute towards Nutribrick production.

In its dry form, the Nutribrick is inedible to players, but it can be added to Crock Pot as an Inedible filler.

Moistened Nutribrick

Once a Nutribrick becomes wet, it becomes a Moistened Nutribrick. In this state, it can be eaten by players and begins spoiling. If it dries out, it reverts back to a regular Nutribrick.

Moistened Nutribrick can be added to Crock Pot as an Inedible filler. It can also be used as Nutrient for the farm Soil.

Tips

  • Nutribricks can be splashed with a Watering Can to moisten them without having to find a source of water.
  • While the dry form of Nutribricks cannot be stored in Wilson's beard, the moistened form can, and will remain after it dries. It will however be left on the ground once you reload the world.

Trivia

  • Nutribrick is added in WX-78 Skill Spotlight update.
  • Nutribricks are based on hardtack, an extremely hard and dry ration that can last for years and requires moistening to be eaten.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“It's too hard to eat.”
–Wilson
“It would be like trying to eat an actual brick.”
–Willow
“It is too hard for even Wolfgang mighty teeth.”
–Wolfgang
“It's impossible to eat like that.”
–Wendy
“TOO DENSE FOR PROCESSING. MISSING INPUT”
–WX-78
“The nutrient brick is inedible in its desicated form.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd break my teeth on that!”
–Woodie
“Not that I'd want to, but it's too dry to eat.”
–Maxwell
“Even Mjölnir cöuld nöt crack this föul brick!”
–Wigfrid
“It's sooooo dry!”
–Webber
“Adding water will not make it less horrible.”
–Warly
“Too hard!”
–Wormwood
“Now that's a jawbreaker.”
–Winona
“Not appetizing without first moisturizing.”
–Wortox
“So hard!”
–Wurt
“It's harder than a stale dog biscuit, Woby!”
–Walter
“It's too hard to eat.”
–Wanda
“Produced by WX-78 with the Redigestion Circuit.
Can be moistened to be edible, or used as fertilizer.”
-

–Wickerbottom
“Looks good?”
–Woodie
“Of all the things I've eaten here, this takes the cake.”
–Maxwell
“A cursed löaf, börn fröm the very innards öf the metal warriör!”
–Wigfrid
“A robot cake?”
–Webber
“It is most appalling.”
–Warly
“Food from robot friend!”
–Wormwood
“Machine processed food?”
–Winona
“Moisturized, yet still not appetized.”
–Wortox
“Made inside Ironfolk? Florp!”
–Wurt
“Kinda mushy now, but that's okay!”
–Walter
“WX, how kind of you...”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Nutribrick là một Đồ Ăn trong Don't Starve Together. Nó được tạo ra từ quá trình xử lý 5 Thối, Trứng Thối, Cá Thối hoặc Miếng Cá Hư bằng cách sử dụng Mạch Tái Tiêu Hóa của WX-78.
